name: --code
-c
options.description: Format the code passed in as a string

name: --line-length
-l
options.description: How many characters per line to allow

name: --target-version
-t
options.description: Python versions that should be supported

options.name: --pyi
options.description: Format all input files regardless of file extension

options.name: --ipynb
options.description: Format all input files like Jupyter Notebooks regardless of file extension

options.name: --python-cell-magics
options.description: Add the given magic to the list of known python-magics

name: --skip-string-normalization
-S
options.description: Don't normalize string quotes or prefixes

name: --skip-magic-trailing-comma
-C
options.description: Don't use trailing commas as a reason to split lines

options.name: --preview
options.description: Enable potentially disruptive style changes

options.name: --check
options.description: Don't write the files back, just return the status

options.name: --diff
options.description: Don't write the files back, just output a diff for each file on stdout

options.name: --color
options.description: Show colored diff

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Show uncolored diff

options.name: --fast
options.description: Skip temporary sanity checks

options.name: --safe
options.description: Run temporary sanity checks

options.name: --required-version
options.description: Require a specific version of Black

options.name: --include
options.description: Regex that matches files and directories that should be included on recursive searches

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Regex that matches files and directories that should be excluded on recursive searches

options.name: --extend-exclude
options.description: Additional exlusions

options.name: --force-exclude
options.description: Exlude matching files and folders even when passed explicitly

options.name: --stdin-filename
options.description: The name of the file when passing it through stdin

name: --workers
-W
options.description: Number of parallel workers

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Don't emit non-error messages to stderr

name: --verbose
-v
options.description: Also emit messages about files that were not changed or were ignored due to exclusion patterns

options.name: --version
options.description: Show the version

options.name: --config
options.description: Read configuration from filepath

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show usage information
